//1: MCP SERVERS (placeholders). The profile's mcpServers field points at
//2: THIS file on GitHub, so activating the profile loads these servers.
//3: Replace the REPLACE-WITH-* values with your team's real servers, or
//4: delete servers you don't use. Secrets use ${input:...} so they are
//5: prompted once and stored encrypted by the OS — never committed here.
//6: These are EXAMPLES and will not connect until you fill them in.
//7: Note: //-prefixed keys are comments; the MCP loader ignores them.

team_knowledge_search.//label: Knowledge search (e.g. Glean) — remote MCP over npx mcp-remote
team_knowledge_search.//why: Lets the assistant search your internal docs/wiki from chat.

example_api_server.//label: Generic API server needing a secret key
example_api_server.//why: Template for any MCP server that needs an API key. Shows the
example_api_server.//why2: ${input:...} pattern — the value is prompted on first use.

inputs.description: API key for example_api_server (entered once, stored encrypted)
